sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62691" key="leukomaini/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λευκο-μαινίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n62691.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the white sprat</tr_> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">μαινίς</etym>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0498.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polioch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
